task.title: Ignore superseded unscoped validation blockers
task.summary: Prevent stale unscoped validation block reports from routing current feedback reconciliation after a matching pass report supersedes them.

goal.outcome: Graph reconciliation only routes active validation blockers and ignores stale unscoped blockers superseded by pass evidence.
acceptance: Unscoped fail/block validation reports do not route current feedback reconciliation when they lack an active task target.
A fail/block validation with a matching same-profile same-source pass report does not route current reconciliation.
Active task-scoped fail/block validation still routes reconciliation.
Regression smoke covers the superseded unscoped block case.
non_goals: Do not delete historical validation reports.
Do not suppress active task-scoped validation failures or blockers.
verification: codewiki_state refresh=true shows no stale feedback reconciliation from superseded block

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Stopped stale unscoped validation block reports from routing current feedback reconciliation while preserving unscoped fail and task-scoped blocker routing.

evidence: Added alignment graph smoke cases for unscoped block suppression and unscoped fail preservation.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/graph.ts validation reconciliation filters unscoped block and superseded fail/block validation reports.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added alignment graph smoke cases for unscoped block suppression and unscoped fail preservation.
code_change_evidence: src/application/graph.ts validation reconciliation filters unscoped block and superseded fail/block validation reports.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Unscoped fail/block validation reports do not route current feedback reconciliation when they lack an active task target.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/graph.ts skips unscoped block validations; rebuilt graph no longer routes .codewiki/validation/2026-05-16-feedback-block.json.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: A fail/block validation with a matching same-profile same-source pass report does not route current reconciliation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph checks same-profile/same-source pass reports and tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs covers matching pass/block case.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Active task-scoped fail/block validation still routes reconciliation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Existing alignment graph smoke covers active task-scoped fail validation; npm test passes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Unscoped fail validation still routes documentation drift.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs adds unscoped fail validation assertion.

closure_brief.user_intent: Resolve stale feedback blocker after all roadmap tasks closed.
implemented_changes: Filtered stale unscoped block validation reconciliation.
Kept unscoped fail and active task-scoped validation routing.
acceptance_evidence: rebuilt graph no longer routes stale feedback-block validation
non_goals_preserved: Did not delete historical validation reports.
Did not suppress active task-scoped validation failures or blockers.

risks: Generated graph/task views changed by rebuild and need commit/close sequence.
